about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Your ultimate destination for sports gear and court bookings

story.title: Our Story
story.content: Sports E-commerce was founded with the mission to bring customers high-quality sports products and convenient court booking services. We are committed to providing the best shopping experience with reasonable prices and excellent customer service.

mission.title: Mission
mission.description: To bring high-quality sports products and convenient court booking services to everyone

vision.title: Vision
vision.description: To become the leading sports e-commerce platform in Vietnam

values.title: Values
values.description: Quality, trust, and customer satisfaction are our top priorities

commitment.title: Commitment
commitment.description: Committed to providing the best shopping experience with reasonable prices

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We're always here to help

address.title: Address
address.content: 123 ABC Street, XYZ District, Ho Chi Minh City

contact.error: An error occurred. Please try again.

1.question: How do I place an order?
1.answer: You can place an order by adding products to your cart and proceeding to checkout. We support multiple payment methods.

2.question: What is the delivery time?
2.answer: Delivery time depends on the shipping method you choose. Standard shipping usually takes 3-5 days, express shipping takes 1-2 days.

3.question: Can I return/exchange items?
3.answer: Yes, we accept returns/exchanges within 7 days of receiving the item. Products must be in original condition and unused.

4.question: How do I book a court?
4.answer: You can search for courts on the website, select a suitable date and time, then proceed to book and pay.

5.question: Can I cancel a court booking?
5.answer: Yes, you can cancel a court booking 24 hours in advance for a full refund. Cancellations after this time may incur a cancellation fee.

6.question: What payment methods are accepted?
6.answer: We accept credit cards, debit cards, e-wallets, and cash on delivery.

7.question: How do I track my order?
7.answer: After placing an order, you will receive a confirmation email with an order number. You can use this number to track your order in the 'My Orders' section.

8.question: Can I buy products in bulk?
8.answer: Yes, we offer discounts for bulk orders. Please contact us for more details.

express.description: Fast shipping for customers in a hurry

returns.title: Returns & Exchanges
returns.description: We accept returns/exchanges within 7 days. Products must be in original condition and unused.

insurance.title: Insurance
insurance.description: All orders are insured during shipping. If products are damaged, we will refund or replace them.

info.title: Note
info.content: Delivery times may vary depending on location and weather conditions. We will notify you of any changes.

1.title: 1. Information Collection
1.content: We collect your personal information when you register an account, place an order, or use our services. This information includes name, email, phone number, address, and payment information.

2.title: 2. Use of Information
2.content: We use your information to process orders, improve services, send order notifications, and provide customer support.

3.title: 3. Information Security
3.content: We use advanced security measures to protect your personal information. All data is encrypted and stored securely.

4.title: 4. Information Sharing
4.content: We do not sell, rent, or share your personal information with third parties, except as required by law.

5.title: 5. Your Rights
5.content: You have the right to access, edit, or delete your personal information at any time by logging into your account.

6.title: 6. Contact
6.content: If you have questions about this privacy policy, please contact us at: privacy@sportsecommerce.com

1.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
1.content: By using this website, you agree to comply with and be bound by these terms and conditions.

2.title: 2. Use of Services
2.content: You agree to use our services lawfully and not violate any legal regulations.

3.title: 3. Orders and Payments
3.content: All orders are subject to our acceptance. We reserve the right to refuse or cancel any order.

4.title: 4. Prices and Products
4.content: We strive to ensure the accuracy of product information and prices, but errors may occur. We reserve the right to correct errors and refuse orders based on inaccurate information.

5.title: 5. Returns and Refunds
5.content: Return and refund policies apply according to our regulations. Please see details in the 'Shipping' section.

6.title: 6. Limitation of Liability
6.content: We are not liable for any damages arising from the use or inability to use our services.
